name: Nutty Seeded Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the active dry yeast and water. Let sit for about 10 minutes until foamy.
3. Add the bread flour, cornmeal, whole-wheat flour, pumpkin seeds, pine nuts, poppy seeds, sunflower seeds, sesame seeds, nonfat dry milk powder, oil, salt, and sugar to the bowl with the yeast mixture.
4. Mix all ingredients together until a soft dough forms.
5. Transfer the dough to your bread machine and follow the manufacturer's instructions for kneading and baking on a light crust.
6. Bake according to the bread machine settings.
7. Enjoy the flavorful bread!
